rules.instruction: Start a fresh Aider process for every micro-task. Never reuse Builder chat history.
Prefer one writable file per Builder task. Split library, CLI, and test changes into separate tasks when practical.
The prompt must explicitly name the same file that is provided to Aider.
Use Aider edit format diff with qwen3-coder. Whole edit format may produce proposed patches without applying them.
Modify only the files and behavior explicitly requested. Do not refactor unrelated code.
Existing module-level functions and classes must remain unless removal is explicitly required.
Exit code zero is not completion. A coding task succeeds only when at least one allowed task file has a real Git change.
Never commit or push. The orchestrator owns version-control decisions.
